title: Post-010 Operations Visibility Lane Reopening Decision
objective: Consume the completed Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 010 authority chain and decide whether the default Operations Visibility business lane may now reopen as the first post-cutover follow-on.
dependency_note: Packet 010 satisfied the cutover exit rule on a bounded evidence basis. Packet 011 exists to reopen only the default Operations Visibility business lane explicitly, rather than implying a generic product-wide reopening.
decision_requirements: Reopen only the default Operations Visibility lane, not broader unrelated product lanes.
Preserve Remote-SSH as the baseline-safe client path for ongoing execution.
Treat the browser-delivered Olares desktop UI only as an optional host-supported comparison surface.
Keep AI-services expansion, hosting transition, package or lockfile mutation, runtime/service mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, clean, and old-clone mutation closed by default.
Select a later bounded planning packet as the next candidate rather than reopening generic implementation immediately.
decision_rationale: The Dev Residency chain now proves host residency, toolchain/runtime proof, publication continuity, client-only laptop posture, and one bounded real Olares-hosted validation slice.
The cutover milestone and technical plans already name Operations Visibility as the default business follow-on after the cutover baseline is proven.
A later bounded planning packet is still required so the first post-cutover slice remains explicit and controlled.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 012 - Operations Visibility First Bounded Slice Planning
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as the post-010 lane reopening decision. Packet 011 reopened only the default Operations Visibility business lane and selected a later bounded planning packet as the next candidate. It did not reopen unrelated product lanes, AI-services expansion, hosting transition, package or lockfile mutation, runtime or service mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, clean, or old-clone mutation.
next_action: Execute `Olares Dev Residency 012 - Operations Visibility First Bounded Slice Planning` as the next bounded planning surface.
